title: Sugared Almonds Pink, Luxury Wedding Favour Confectionery Sweets (1kg Box / Approx 250 Pieces)
description: Approx 250 almonds per box, weighing approx 1kg. superior quality almonds coated in a sugar shell. A traditional italian favour wedding box bonboniere confectionery. Not suitable for children under the age of 36 months.
